output.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?year WHERE {
  wd:Q188228 wdt:P1344 ?tournament .
  ?tournament wdt:P585 ?date .
  BIND(YEAR(?date) AS ?year)
}
ORDER BY ?year
LIMIT 1
